subject: refactor(import-export): remove markdown and CSV, JSON-only import/export
body:
Remove all markdown import and CSV export functionality. Graphiki now
supports JSON as the only import and export format.

Changes:
- Delete markdownImportService.ts and its 862 lines of tests
- Remove CSV export (exportNodesToCsv) from importExportService
- Remove remark-frontmatter and yaml npm dependencies
- Simplify ImportModal: JSON file upload + paste JSON text (replaces
  paste markdown). Remove all markdown detection/parsing code paths.
- Simplify ExportModal: single JSON export button (remove CSV option
  and filteredNodes prop)
- Simplify ConventionsModal: remove format tabs, single JSON convention
  display. Export CONVENTION_CONTENT string instead of CONVENTIONS array.
- Update conventions.ts: remove markdown format entry, remove shared
  section comments referencing two formats
- Remove docs/markdown-import-format.md
- Update CLAUDE.md and CODEBASE_DOCUMENTATION.md
- Add bulk edit to TODO.md (user-requested feature idea)

All 228 tests pass. Lint clean. Build succeeds.

Tags: import, export, cleanup, markdown, csv, json
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: import-export
Semver: major
